+-- Function to add a file to the staging area                                  
+function add(file)                                                             
+    local repo_dir = ".git"                                                    
+    if not (io.popen("test -d " .. repo_dir, "r"):read("*all") == "") then     
+        os.execute("cp " .. file .. " " .. repo_dir .. "/objects/" .. file)    
+        print("Added " .. file .. " to the staging area.")

 end                                                                            
                                                                                
+-- Function to commit changes to the repository                                
+function commit(message)                                                       
+    local repo_dir = ".git"                                                    
+    if not (io.popen("test -d " .. repo_dir, "r"):read("*all") == "") then     
+        os.execute("echo '" .. message .. "' > " .. repo_dir .. "/HEAD")       
+        print("Committed changes with message: " .. message)                   
+    else                                                                       
+        print("Not a Git repository.")                                         
+    end                                                                        
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+-- Function to checkout a file from the repository                             
+function checkout(file)                                                        
+    local repo_dir = ".git"                                                    
+    if not (io.popen("test -d " .. repo_dir, "r"):read("*all") == "") then     
+        os.execute("cp " .. repo_dir .. "/objects/" .. file .. " " .. file)    
+        print("Checked out " .. file .. " from the repository.")               
+    else                                                                       
+        print("Not a Git repository.")                                         
+    end                                                                        
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+-- Function to reset the working directory to the last commit                  
+function reset()                                                               
+    local repo_dir = ".git"                                                    
+    if not (io.popen("test -d " .. repo_dir, "r"):read("*all") == "") then     
+        os.execute("rm -f *")                                                  
+        for file in io.popen("ls " .. repo_dir .. "/objects/"):lines() do      
+            os.execute("cp " .. repo_dir .. "/objects/" .. file .. " .")       
+        end                                                                    
+        print("Reset working directory to the last commit.")                   
+    else                                                                       
+        print("Not a Git repository.")                                         
+    end                                                                        
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+-- Main function to handle commands                                            
+function main()                                                                
+    local args = {...}                                                         
+    if #args == 0 then                                                         
+        print("Usage: minigit <command> [options]")                            
+        return                                                                 
+    end                                                                        
+                                                                               
+    local command = args[1]                                                    
+    table.remove(args, 1)                                                      
+                                                                               
+    if command == "init" then                                                  
+        init()                                                                 
+    elseif command == "add" then                                               
+        for _, file in ipairs(args) do                                         
+            add(file)                                                          
+        end                                                                    
+    elseif command == "commit" then                                            
+        commit(table.concat(args, " "))                                        
+    elseif command == "checkout" then                                          
+        for _, file in ipairs(args) do                                         
+            checkout(file)                                                     
+        end                                                                    
+    elseif command == "reset" then
